From: "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>
Subject: Sikorsky
Date: Fri, 28 Sep 2007 14:23:59 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com
Cc: "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>

I understand Jeffrey's desire to maximize his investment.  I believe I
have an immediate buyer at $12.5 million (but the broker wants 2-1/2%).
Certainly there is the opportunity to get more.  I do not think you will
break $13 million.  I'll run this anyway you want but I suggest we don't
miss the opportunity of my trip to London next week with Sikorsky.  Just
give me guidelines.  We know each other well enough that verbal works
between you and me.    I do need to get back to the offer on the table
or he will be gone.  
 
George Reenstra
Aircraft Services Group, Inc.
545 Island Road, Suite 2B
Ramsey, NJ  07446
Phone:  201-995-9570
Fax:      201-995-9504
E-Mail:  george@yourjet.com

From: "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>
Subject: Sikorsky
Date: Thu, 27 Sep 2007 17:47:13 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Going to london monday for sikorsky. Major helicopter show. Give me the 76 to sell if you want. What price.  Do you want. I think low to mid 12 would work.   I will buy it at your price now and split the profit if you want out now. Looking for a 1.5 per cent otherwise as broker

Let me know
